_instructions: Fill in this template for each client engagement. The validation agent reads this at runtime to understand what components exist, their constraints, and their Figma references. Add one entry per production-ready component. Keep in sync with the client's Storybook.

components.name: [ComponentName]
components.title: [Category/ComponentName]
components._contentEditableNote: Fields exposed in the CMS editor. Keep in sync with the CMS schema.
components._imageSlotsNote: One entry per image prop. QA validates against these specs.
components._variantsNote: Named story exports. Names must match the Storybook story exactly.

tokenContract._note: Optional. List the tokens this component is expected to use. Validation agent flags hardcoded values.

components._comment: Add more components following the same pattern. One entry per production-ready component.
components.name: [SecondComponent]
components.title: [Category/SecondComponent]

humanReviewTriggers: Any color value not referencing a token
Any new prop not present in the component package
Any prop categorised ⚠ Proposed — Needs Review
Any image slot missing a spec
Any variant name that is a single word with no context
